title: Application - Update from previous app version while using guest account (TBD)
scenario: App update from previous version fails or behaves unexpectedly when using a guest account in Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the app is currently logged in using a Guest account.
3. Navigate to the Google Play Store and check for available updates for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Install the available update for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. After the update completes, relaunch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Observe the app state and account status after the update.
expected: The app should successfully update and relaunch, retaining the Guest account session without data loss or errors.
